# PuDescriptionList

## Intent

- description list
- metadata group
- label-value facts

## Prefer When

- Use for grouped facts, profile details, order metadata, or read-only field summaries.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for editable forms; use PuForm and field components.

## Import

```ts
import { PuDescriptionList } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```
